description.p: Added:

ul.li: KDE option to enable accent color from wallpaper, disabled by default.
Add wayfire display focus by @Arzumify in #26

description.p: Fixed:

ul.li: fix(gnome): keep top panel visible by not fullscreening renderer source window by @GemeWolf in #25

description.p: Added:

ul.li: Add niri focus checking by @Arzumify in https://github.com/waywallen/waywallen-display/pull/19

description.p: Fixed:
Fixed: DMA-BUF relay foreign image ownership.
Fixed: Multi-plane Vulkan import fd ownership.
Added: Layer-shell display process package.
Changed: Rust package name now matches waywallen-display.
Changed: Release CI now builds the layer-shell artifact.
Added: GNOME Shell extension package.
Added: GObject integration cleanup for GNOME rendering.
Changed: Release CI can build and upload the GNOME extension zip.
Fixed: GNOME extension metadata compliance.
Fixed: GNOME multi-monitor null handling and monitor scaling.
Fixed: Display disconnect storms and black initial background.
Changed: KDE CI builds the embedded QML module variant.
Changed: KDE config no longer exposes the SurfaceMode option.
Added: Configurable QML module URI for embedded builds.
Added: KDE diagnostics for display import and screen state.
Fixed: Protocol read/write overflow guards in generated bindings.
Added: KDE auto-pause support.
Added: KDE configuration hints for Plasma shell restart and X11 EGL backend setup.
Added: QML plugin transform handling.
Added: Display library version API.
Added: Release syncobj signaling for lower-latency frame release.
Added: Clear-color support.
Changed: Reworked frame release handling to avoid device loss during rapid wallpaper switching.
Fixed: EGL dirty-geometry and context state handling.
